race.description: Warwick Automotive Group Picnic Cup (Bm60) Hcp
race.comment: SIR MEMPHIS (6) booted up from the inside draw to lead last start and went on to score by a nose at Toowoomba over 1625m. Winning rider Stacey Callow sticks. Bold showing expected. CHICAGO KING (2) settled well back last time out then found the line strongly to finish 5.5 lengths away in fourth over 1400m at Gold Coast. Solid top-three prospects. TAKUNAI (12) progressed nicely last time out to finish just a long neck from the winner in second over 1400m at Beaudesert. Capable of featuring prominently. BEST COFFEE (8) should appreciate coming back to this level of racing today and can't be left out of calculations.
